subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #055 Soul, Spirit, and Mind
subcodes.first_line: It was already explained that in general spirit is divided into five categories: the vegetable spirit, the animal spirit, the human spirit, the spirit of faith, and the Holy Spirit.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از پیش بیان شد که کلیهء ارواح در پنج نوع تقسیم میشود روح نباتی روح حیوانی روح انسانی روح ایمانی روح القدس
subcodes.subjects: @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @the human soul, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @mind as intermediary between soul and body
